name: mugen
description: Mugen — Online Multiplayer Strategy Card Game

scripts.localdev: sh -c 'pkill -f "tsx.*server" 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -f "vite" 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -f "node.*server" 2>/dev/null || true; lsof -ti:3000,3001,5173 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 1; pnpm --filter @mugen/server dev:local & SERVER_PID=$!; trap "kill $SERVER_PID" EXIT INT TERM; pnpm --filter @mugen/client dev:local'
scripts.multidev: sh -c 'pkill -f "tsx.*server" 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -f "vite" 2>/dev/null || true; pkill -f "node.*server" 2>/dev/null || true; lsof -ti:3000,3001,5173 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 1; pnpm --filter @mugen/server dev:beta & SERVER_PID=$!; trap "kill $SERVER_PID" EXIT INT TERM; pnpm --filter @mugen/client dev:beta'
scripts.betadev: sh -c 'pnpm --filter @mugen/server dev:beta & SERVER_PID=$!; trap "kill $SERVER_PID" EXIT INT TERM; pnpm --filter @mugen/client dev:beta'
